artifact_classes.name: coordination
artifact_classes.description: Artifacts that align people, decisions, schedules, and next steps.

artifact_classes.name: governance
artifact_classes.description: Control-plane artifacts that define or enforce governance policy, stage constraints, and authority boundaries.

artifact_classes.name: review
artifact_classes.description: Artifacts that capture comments, critique, adjudication, or approval/revision state.

artifact_classes.name: work
artifact_classes.description: Artifacts that capture technical analysis or study outputs in progress or final form.
